app.title: Folder reader
app.chooseFolder: Choose a folder to list its contents.
app.previewHint: Select a file to read its text content, or open a subfolder. Use Settings to restore ignored folders.
app.encryptedBadgeHint: This file is opened as electron-store encrypted (right-click to change).
app.lmdbBadgeHint: Opened as LMDB (right-click to change). Double-click the folder to browse inside.
app.mapBadgeHint: This GeoJSON file is on the map (Settings → remove or right-click the file).

settings.title: Settings
settings.lead: Manage ignored folder names and optional LMDB preview. Configuration is stored with <bold>electron-store</bold>.
settings.ignoredHint: Folders you hide via right-click → "Ignore folder" are listed here. Use "Restore" to show one name again, or "Restore all" to clear the list.
settings.ignoredExtHint: Files with these extensions are hidden in the explorer (e.g. tmp, map). Enter without the dot.
settings.geoMapHint: Layers added from the explorer (right-click a .geojson file → Add to map) are stored here as paths relative to the workspace folder.
settings.geoMapEmpty: No GeoJSON layers on the map yet.
settings.workspaceRootLabel: Workspace folder (relative paths are based on this directory):
settings.lmdbHint: Path to an LMDB database directory: absolute, or relative to the workspace folder above. If empty, LMDB_PATH from the environment is used when loading keys.
settings.storeKeyHint: Encrypted file preview: set STORE_KEY in the project `.env` (same key as electron-store encryptionKey) so the app can decrypt.
settings.extensionHint: Choose whether files with each extension open as UTF-8 text or as an image preview. Built-in defaults include common image types; you can add or override (e.g. svg as text for source editing).
settings.logsHint: Lines are colored by the first rule whose text appears as a substring (order matters). By default, highlighting applies to files ending in .log only.
settings.logForAllTextLabel: Apply these rules to all text previews (not only .log files)

lmdb.empty: No keys (empty path or empty database).

confirm.clearIgnored: Remove all ignored folder names? Those folders will show again in the sidebar everywhere.
confirm.clearIgnoredExtensions: Remove all ignored file extensions? Matching files will show again in the explorer.
